CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 String, s2 String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('我是谁', '我是我');
CREATE TABLE string_distance AS SELECT s1, s2, editDistanceUTF8(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT distance FROM string_distance WHERE distance > 0;
CREATE TABLE complex_test AS SELECT s1, s2, editDistanceUTF8(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE length(s1) > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_test WHERE distance < 3;
CREATE TABLE null_test (s1 Nullable(String), s2 Nullable(String));
INSERT INTO null_test VALUES (NULL, 'Some string'), ('Another string', NULL), (NULL, NULL);
SELECT editDistanceUTF8(s1, s2) FROM test_strings WHERE s1 IN (SELECT s1 FROM test_strings WHERE length(s1) < 4);
CREATE TABLE join_strings AS SELECT t1.s1, t2.s2, editDistanceUTF8(t1.s1, t2.s2) AS distance FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON t1.s1 != t2.s1;
